senses.definition: an electric device that is used for shaving

examples.x: He prefers using an electric razor for its convenience and speed.
The electric razor features different settings for a customized shave.
She found that an electric razor reduces the chances of cuts and nicks.
Many electric razors come with rechargeable batteries for portability.
She appreciated how easy it was to clean the electric razor after use.

senses.definition: an electric tool used for shaving

examples.x: He decided to use a shaver for a quick and convenient grooming routine.
The shaver's blades are designed for a close and comfortable shave.
He invested in a high-quality shaver for a smoother finish.
The shaver comes with a cleaning brush for easy maintenance.

senses.definition: a cream that is applied to the skin to protect it from the harmful rays of the sun

examples.x: The dermatologist recommended using a broad-spectrum sunscreen for best protection.
He always keeps a bottle of sunscreen in his beach bag.
Water-resistant sunscreen is ideal for swimming or outdoor activities.

senses.definition: a liquid used to wash one's hair

examples.x: She chose a sulfate-free shampoo to keep her color-treated hair vibrant.
The shampoo lathered nicely and left her hair feeling clean.
He prefers using a gentle shampoo for his sensitive scalp.
The salon offered a variety of shampoos for different hair types.
The natural shampoo contained organic ingredients and no harsh chemicals.

senses.definition: a liquid or cream applied to the hair after shampooing in order to make it softer and easier to style

examples.x: She applied conditioner to her hair to keep it soft and smooth.
The conditioner helped to reduce frizz and add shine to her locks.
He chose a leave-in conditioner for extra hydration throughout the day.
The salon recommended a deep conditioner for repairing damaged hair.
It is important to use conditioner that suits your specific hair type.

senses.definition: a healing or soothing substance with a nice smell applied to the skin in order to relieve pain, irritation, or discomfort

examples.x: She applied a cooling balm to her sunburned skin to soothe the pain.
Lavender essential oil is known for its calming properties and is often used as a balm for stress
After a long day on her feet, she massaged a soothing balm into her tired muscles.
Aloe vera gel is a natural balm known for its ability to calm and moisturize sunburned skin.
The herbal balm provided instant relief to his chapped lips in the dry winter weather.

senses.definition: any type of liquid that is put on the skin to protect or clean it

examples.x: She applied lotion after her shower to keep her skin soft and hydrated.
The lotion absorbed quickly and did not leave a greasy feel.
He preferred a fragrance-free lotion for sensitive skin.
She carried a small bottle of lotion in her bag for dry hands.
The lotion contained aloe vera, making it soothing for sunburned skin.

senses.definition: any type of substance that one puts on one's skin, particularly the face, to make it look more attractive

examples.x: She has a wide collection of cosmetics for different makeup looks.
He learned how to apply cosmetics through online tutorials.
Many cosmetics are formulated with skin-nourishing ingredients.
She enjoys experimenting with new cosmetics and trends.

senses.definition: a clear and jelly-like substance used in cosmetic or medicinal products for the hair or skin

examples.x: The doctor applied a cooling gel to the burn to alleviate the pain and promote healing.
He used a gel toothpaste that promised to whiten teeth while preventing cavities.
The skincare routine included a hydrating gel to keep the skin moisturized throughout the day.

senses.definition: a cosmetic product that is sprayed on the hair in order to make it fixed in its position

examples.x: She sprayed hairspray on her hair to keep her curls intact all day.
He used a lightweight hairspray for a natural look and feel.
The hairspray offered a strong hold without making her hair stiff.
The salon recommended a humidity-resistant hairspray for outdoor events.
She liked the added shine that the hairspray provided to her hairstyle.

senses.definition: a usually black cosmetic that is worn at the edges of the eyes to make them appear more attractive or noticeable

examples.x: She used a black eyeliner to create a bold cat-eye look.
The makeup artist applied eyeliner to enhance the shape of her eyes.
He preferred a gel eyeliner for its smooth application and long wear.
A thin line of eyeliner can make the eyes appear larger and more awake.
The store offers a range of eyeliner colors to match any makeup style.

senses.definition: a colored cosmetic cream or powder applied to the eyelids or around the eyes to make them stand out or appear more attractive

examples.x: She chose a shimmering gold eyeshadow for a festive look.
The makeup artist blended different eyeshadow shades to create a smoky effect.
He experimented with bold colors of eyeshadow for a dramatic appearance.
Eyeshadow can be layered for a more intense color payoff.
A subtle eyeshadow can enhance natural beauty without being overpowering.

senses.definition: the powder or cream that is put on the cheeks to make them look attractive by giving them color

examples.x: She applied a soft pink blush to brighten her complexion.
He preferred a cream blush for a more dewy finish.
The store carries a variety of blush shades to suit different skin tones.
A light touch of blush can make a significant difference in a makeup look.
The makeup artist used blush to enhance her natural features.

senses.definition: a skin-toned cosmetic, typically in cream or liquid form, used to hide dark circles around the eyes or other imperfections on the skin

examples.x: She dabbed a bit of concealer under her eyes to hide the dark circles after a sleepless night.
The makeup artist used a green-tinted concealer to neutralize the redness from acne scars.
He applied a concealer stick to cover up the tattoo on his forearm for the job interview.
The concealer blended seamlessly with her foundation, providing a flawless complexion.
The beauty vlogger demonstrated how to use concealer to contour and highlight facial features.

senses.definition: a skin-toned cosmetic powder applied to the face to make it less shiny and hide any imperfections on the skin

examples.x: She dusted face powder over her T-zone to reduce oiliness and set her makeup.
The translucent face powder helped blur imperfections and gave her skin a smooth appearance.
He used a loose face powder with SPF to protect his skin from sun exposure while adding a natural glow.
The makeup artist applied a light layer of face powder to ensure the foundation stayed in place throughout the photoshoot.
Her compact face powder included a mirror, making it convenient for touch-ups throughout the day.

senses.definition: a substance in the form of cream, powder, or liquid applied to facial skin to cover imperfections and prepare it for other cosmetics

examples.x: She applied a lightweight liquid foundation to achieve a natural-looking base for her makeup.
The foundation cream provided full coverage, hiding acne scars and blemishes effectively.
He used a mineral powder foundation for a matte finish that lasted all day.
The makeup artist matched the foundation shade perfectly to her client's skin tone, ensuring a seamless blend.
Her skincare routine included applying a moisturizing primer before the foundation for a flawless complexion.

senses.definition: a cosmetic substance in liquid or gel form applied to the lips to give them a shiny effect and often a bit of color

examples.x: She applied a coat of pink lip gloss to add shine and moisture to her lips.
The lip gloss had a hint of shimmer, giving her lips a radiant sparkle.
He gifted her a set of flavored lip glosses in various shades for her birthday.
The clear lip gloss enhanced the natural color of her lips while keeping them hydrated.
The makeup artist used a plumping lip gloss to create fuller-looking lips for the photo shoot.

senses.definition: a waxy colored make-up that is worn on the lips

examples.x: She chose a bold red lipstick for a night out.
The lipstick left a smooth, creamy finish on her lips.
He noticed how her lipstick complemented her outfit beautifully.
She always carries her favorite lipstick in her purse for touch-ups.
She experimented with different lipstick shades to find her perfect match.

senses.definition: a black make-up used to lengthen or darken the eyelashes

examples.x: She applied mascara to make her eyes stand out during the event.
The mascara gave her lashes a dramatic, fluttery look.
He preferred waterproof mascara for its durability throughout the day.
She used an eyelash curler before applying mascara for added lift.
The makeup artist recommended a volumizing mascara for fuller lashes.

senses.definition: a cosmetic liquid that is put on the nails to color them and make them look attractive

examples.x: She chose a bright red nail polish for a bold look.
He carefully applied the nail polish to avoid any smudges.
The salon offers a wide selection of nail polish colors and designs.
After the nail polish dried, she added a glossy top coat.

senses.definition: a substance that the face is covered with temporarily and is then removed in order to soothe or heal the skin

examples.x: She applied a clay face mask to draw out impurities and reduce oiliness from her skin.
The hydrating face mask left her skin feeling soft and moisturized after a long day outdoors.
He used a charcoal face mask to unclog pores and minimize blackheads on his nose.
The spa offered a relaxing facial treatment that included a customized face mask for each client's skin type.
Her weekly skincare routine included using a brightening face mask to even out her complexion and reduce dark spots.

senses.definition: a colored substance used to impart or alter the color of materials such as fabric, yarn, or other items through immersion or application

examples.x: Natural dyes can be made from plants, fruits, and vegetables.
She bought a bright red dye to color her fabric for the project.
He carefully applied the dye to ensure an even color on his shirt.
She learned how to make her own dye using natural ingredients.

senses.definition: a small tool with two long parts that are joined at one end, used for gripping and plucking small objects, particularly hairs

examples.x: She used tweezers to pluck stray eyebrow hairs and shape her brows.
The precision tweezers allowed him to remove a splinter from his finger without difficulty.
The jeweler used tweezers to carefully handle and place tiny gemstones into the setting.

senses.definition: a liquid that people put on some parts of their skin or clothes to smell better

examples.x: He applied cologne before going out for the evening.
The store offers a wide range of colognes from various brands.
She complimented him on his choice of cologne; it had a fresh scent.
Many people prefer cologne over perfume for its lighter fragrance.
He received a bottle of cologne as a gift for his birthday.

senses.definition: a substance that people put on their skin to make it smell better or to hide bad ones

examples.x: She applies deodorant every morning before going to work.
He prefers a natural deodorant made with organic ingredients.
After exercising, it is important to reapply deodorant to stay fresh.
He discovered that some deodorants can cause skin irritation.

senses.definition: a liquid with antibacterial ingredients that the mouth and teeth are rinsed with in order to become fresh and healthy

examples.x: After brushing and flossing, she swirled mouthwash around her mouth for thirty seconds to ensure fresh breath.
The dentist recommended a fluoride mouthwash to strengthen tooth enamel and prevent cavities.
He chose an alcohol-free mouthwash to avoid drying out his mouth while still maintaining oral hygiene.
The mint-flavored mouthwash left a refreshing sensation in her mouth after each use.
Using mouthwash as part of his daily routine helped reduce gum inflammation and maintain healthy gums.

senses.definition: a soft and silky thread used to clean between the teeth

examples.x: She uses dental floss daily to keep her teeth clean.
He struggled to maneuver the dental floss between his tight teeth.
They included a sample of dental floss in the oral care package.
Using dental floss can help prevent gum disease and cavities.
She always carries dental floss in her purse for after meals.

senses.definition: a metal rough surface used for shaping and evening rough fingernails and toenails

examples.x: She used a nail file to shape her nails before applying polish.
He preferred a glass nail file for its durability and effectiveness.
The nail file is an essential item in her manicure kit.
He always carried a nail file in his grooming kit.

senses.definition: a small stick with round pieces of cotton at each end used for hygienic or cosmetic purposes

examples.x: She used a cotton swab to apply ointment to her cut.
He dipped a cotton swab in nail polish remover to fix his manicure.
Cotton swabs are often included in first aid kits for various uses.
They used cotton swabs to clean delicate electronic components.

senses.definition: any type of substance that one uses to add more color or definition to one's face in order to alter or enhance one's appearance

examples.x: She applied her makeup carefully before the big event.
He noticed her makeup was vibrant and skillfully done.
They offered a makeup tutorial to help others learn techniques.
She prefers natural makeup for everyday wear.
He was surprised by how quickly she could do her makeup.

senses.definition: the object that people use to cut and shorten their nails

examples.x: He kept a pair of nail clippers in his travel bag to maintain his nails while on the go.
The pediatrician used specialized nail clippers designed for infants during the baby's check-up.
The sharp blades of the nail clippers made it easy to trim thick toenails without effort.

senses.definition: a piece of cotton material that a woman inserts into her vagina to stop blood from coming out during her period

examples.x: She always carries tampons in her bag for emergencies.
The store offers a variety of tampons in different absorbencies.
Many women prefer tampons for their comfort and convenience.
She learned how to properly use a tampon during health class.
Some tampons come with applicators for easier insertion.
